keywords.job: I am a witch. Didn't you notice?
keywords.name: Nice to meet you.
keywords.time: I think it is the fourth year after Queen Eloise's crowning, but I cannot tell you date or time.
keywords.sorcerer: Sorcerers have forgotten about the root of all beings: nature.
keywords.druid: Druids are mostly fine people. I'm always happy when I meet one.
keywords.knight: A black knight? Black is the color of witches, why whould any knight carry black?
keywords.paladin: Paladins can use bows, but not brains.
keywords.queen: Eloise is Queen of Carlin. I don't care about royals much, as long as they don't try to tax me.
keywords.carlin: Carlin is a beautiful town, but far from here. Do you live there?
keywords.thais: I've heard stories about that city. It's nowhere near here, that's all I can tell you about it.
keywords.stories: Thais is an overcrowded place inhabited by brutal murderers. At least that's what I've been told.
keywords.tibia$: Tibia is the name of our continent.
keywords.tibianus: Haha, that's a stupid name. Who's that?
keywords.ferumbras: Haha, that's a stupid name. Who's that?
keywords.king: There are too many royals on this continent if you ask me...
keywords.aureus: Aureus is a good friend who spends much time in this area!
keywords.bridge: There's a bridge to the west, but it's guarded by dwarfs.
keywords.plains: Many tales exist about some so-called Plains of Havoc. It seems to be a dangerous place.
keywords.havoc: Many tales exist about some so-called Plains of Havoc. It seems to be a dangerous place.
keywords.help: I can only help with knowledge. What do you want me to tell you about?
keywords.hunter: To the east, there is a little settlement of hunters. They are cruel humans who attack everything they see.
keywords.sell: There's nothing I need right now, thanks.
keywords.key: I keep my keys where they belong - in my pocket.
keywords.monster: Many creatures live in, around, and beneath the swamp. Be careful!
keywords.creature: Many creatures live in, around, and beneath the swamp. Be careful!
keywords.swamp: Be careful of the swamp water, it's poisonous!
keywords.nature: There are many swamp plants, mushrooms, and herbs around here.
keywords.plant: There are many kinds of swamp plants, some can be used for potions, some not.
keywords.potion: The recipe of the potions is one of the witches' secrets!
keywords.secret: The recipe of the potions is one of the witches' secrets!
keywords.recipe: The recipe of the potions is one of the witches' secrets!
keywords.sister: Some sisters of mine are having a meeting nearby. Don't disturb them, or they will get angry and attack you.
keywords.witches: Some sisters of mine are having a meeting nearby. Don't disturb them, or they will get angry and attack you.
keywords.mushroom: Mushrooms taste good and are useful for potions.
keywords.heal: I do not have any potions for healing available right now.
keywords.giant: Yes, there is such a thing in the east, on a small island. It's very powerful.
keywords.spider: Yes, there is such a thing in the east, on a small island. It's very powerful.
keywords.beholder: Beholders? Strange creatures that have mysterious magical abilities.
keywords.slime: There's lots of slime around. It is said that they live from the swamp water.
keywords.god: I believe that nature itself is God.
keywords.magic: The magic of the witches is one of our secrets!
keywords.spell: The magic of the witches is one of our secrets!
keywords.weatherwax: I think I've heard that name before...
keywords.ogg: I think I've heard that name before...
keywords.voodoo: I don't practice such nonsense, that's just a rumour.
keywords.dwarf: The little bearded fellows have a town somewhere in the northwest.
keywords.dwarves: The little bearded fellows have a town somewhere in the northwest.
keywords.little: The little bearded fellows have a town somewhere in the northwest.
keywords.fellows: The little bearded fellows have a town somewhere in the northwest.
keywords.kazordoon: Isn't that the name of the little bearded fellows' town?
keywords.cookie: I bake cookies now and then in my spare time.
keywords.orange: I love exotic fruits. I have oranges imported from the south sometimes, but that's very expensive.
keywords.fly: Haha, no... where did you get that idea? I use it to sweep my platform.
keywords.ride: Haha, no... where did you get that idea? I use it to sweep my platform.
keywords.platform: This platform and house were built by my mother, long ago.
keywords.mother: Of course my mother was also a witch!
keywords.crystal: It's a magical item that only witches can use.
keywords.ball: It's a magical item that only witches can use.
keywords.black: A black knight? Black is the color of witches, why whould any knight carry black?
keywords.earthquake: The earth in this region shakes now and then. Foolish people think that this is because the Gods are angry.
keywords.power: The power of the wand can only be used by witches.
keywords.wand: I use a wooden spellwand. Why are you asking?
keywords.use: The power of the wand can only be used by witches.
keywords.what: The power of the wand can only be used by witches.
keywords.do: The power of the wand can only be used by witches.
keywords.spellwand: I use a wooden spellwand. Why are you asking?
keywords.quest: A quest? Well, if you're so keen on doing me a favour... Why don't you try to find a blood herb?
keywords.herbs: The swamp is home to a wide variety of herbs, but the most famous is the blood herb.
keywords.blood: The blood herb is very rare. This plant would be very useful for me, but I don't know any accessible places to find it.
keywords.herb$: The blood herb is very rare. This plant would be very useful for me, but I don't know any accessible places to find it.

texts: Welcome back, . Hey, nice wand you have there!
Welcome to my hut, ! It's always nice to see a druid here.

greetingPatterns.response: Welcome back, %N. Hey, nice wand you have there!
Welcome to my hut, %N! It's always nice to see a druid here.

entries.response: Well, do you own one or not?
Thank you so much! Here, let me give you a reward...
